mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future equity cash flows, leading to lower present values and negative forward S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over 3-year rolling windows or positive returns dominate during rate hikes.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate above 5.5% signals labor market deterioration and weak consumer demand, triggering negative equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in over 65% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 5.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in real GDP and housing starts indicates broad-based economic expansion, boosting corporate earnings expectations and driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in GDPC1 and HOUST fails to predict positive 20d returns with statistical significance.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a monetary tightening cycle reflects supply-side contraction that outweighs demand, leading to negative equity returns over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines do not correlate with negative 5-day returns during tightening periods with Rank IC above 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: When core inflation exceeds 3.0%, markets anticipate aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity returns remain positive in over 70% of months where CPIAUCSL exceeds 215.0.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate signals a tightening labor market that supports wage growth and consumer spending, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising PAYEMS and falling UNRATE yields a negative or null Rank IC over 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real stock prices reflect increased household wealth and consumption capacity, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive forward equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: RSAFS levels show no predictive power for 20-day forward returns with Rank IC below 0.01 across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below its 12-month moving average indicates a supply-side recession signal, prompting risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Returns are positive in over 60% of instances when INDPRO drops below its 12-month moving average.
